title: Products Catalog Console

searchPlaceholder: Search by product name, category or description...
emptyDesc: Try adjusting your search keywords, status filters, or category groups.
name: Product Name

validation.nameMin: Product name must be at least 2 characters long
validation.slugMin: Slug must be at least 2 characters long
validation.slugFormat: Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
validation.pricePositive: Price must be a positive number
validation.mrpPositive: MRP must be a positive number
validation.descriptionMin: Description must be at least 10 characters long
validation.imageUrlFormat: Image URL must be a valid URL
validation.priceMrpMismatch: Sale price cannot exceed the original MRP
